---
title: "Contact"
---

Stephen Rhodes  

email: steverho89@gmail.com

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=VXD5emcAAAAJ&hl=en)

[Researchgate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Stephen_Rhodes4)

<div style="text-align: center"><img src="files/sr.jpg" width="400"></div>
-->
